chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1306 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.7134/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.7134/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 22.05.2025 Mr. Wajahat Ali, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Asadullah Mirani son of Lutufullah seeks protective bail in FIR No.850/2024, registered at P.S. Gulistan-e-Johar, Karachi, for offence under Sections 23(a) of the Sindh Arms Act, 2013. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant is innocent and he has been falsely implicated in this case for mala fide intentions and ulterior motives; that applicant was granted bail by learned Court of Sessions concerned but due to some unavoidable circumstances he jumped the bail and now he intends to surrender before learned Court concerned but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of police, therefore, he needs some protection to enable him to appear before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of three days from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
